metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the Job-Hunt Copilot plugin for Claude Cowork / Claude Code.

plugins.name: job-hunt-copilot
plugins.description: Self-driving job-search assistant: interviews you, builds your Master Career Profile from your CV, picks the right job boards for your country, and schedules a 5-agent team (Scout/Polish/Radar/Coach/Sync) with a live dashboard. Any profession, any country. Never submits, sends, spends, or logs in for you.
